name: select
title: Select
description: Dropdown select using `ds-menu` internally. Supports placeholder, isInactive state, and custom chevron icon.

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Select. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.
Used internally by Select. Bundled in @ds-mo/ui.

peerDependencies.frameworks: None — works with React 17+, Angular 12+, plain HTML, and any framework with Custom Element support.
